title: Lifeboat
writer: John Steinbeck, Jo Swerling, Alfred Hitchcock
actors: Tallulah Bankhead, John Hodiak, Walter Slezak
plot: Several survivors of a torpedoed merchant ship in World War II find themselves in the same lifeboat with one of the crew members of the U-boat that sank their ship.
awards: Nominated for 3 Oscars. 5 wins & 3 nominations total
